ValidationResultId.message: Tresos generator is in 'Performance optimized' mode

ValidationResult.Description: In this mode the DaVinci Configurator calls the external tool tresos only once for all selected modules. This results in an improved performance. As downside the validation results for all generated modules are structured below the elements with origin 'Tresos' instead of the MSN for the particular module.
